name: Symbiotic Link
additional_info: Blue Cords (Allies) gain a speed boost, 20% damage resistance, and a 5% damage increase. Red Cords (Enemies) gain a minor speed debuff. Allows you to passively see the health bars of your allies.
desc: Activate by pressing X while hovering over an ally or enemy. The Links are destroyed when you receive damage from a non-ally, you stray too far or you activate it again. Only one cord of each type may exist at once, links give a 3 second warning in break range, in the warning phase, they can't be broken.
